title: Innodata (INOD) Stock Rockets After Blowout Q1 Earnings Beat
text: Innodata Inc. experienced a dramatic stock surge following exceptional first-quarter 2026 results. The company reported revenue of $90.1 million, representing 54% year-over-year growth and significantly exceeding analyst expectations of $76.5 million. Q1 revenue climbed 24% sequentially with adjusted EBITDA near $25 million. Net income more than doubled during the quarter. Adjusted gross margin reached 47%. Management raised its full-year 2026 revenue guidance from 35%+ to approximately 40%+. A major Big Tech client engagement is expected to contribute roughly $51 million in annual revenue. The stock experienced explosive movement, jumping from mid-$40s to surpass $100 per share within days. Reports indicate a single-session gain reaching approximately 92%, with intraday highs near $114.77. Wedbush reaffirmed an Outperform rating, maintained INOD on its IVES AI 30 list, and raised its price target to $80. Wall Street consensus showed a mean target of $90.20. The article emphasizes this momentum reflects real numbers, not just hype, though traders are cautioned about premium valuations following such substantial gains.
